productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Green South Africa Cricket Jersey
description: Green and yellow V-neck jersey with green collar made of 100% polyester with Climacool technology, has short raglan sleeves with white piping on the shoulders and a graphic print on the left sleeve, brand name printed on the right sleeve, Adidas three patented stripes on the shoulders, mesh panels from the armholes extending down the sides with white piping, and 'South Africa' with the cricket team logo printed on the chest
